zh: 爱自己是一生浪漫的开始。
en: Loving yourself is the beginning of a lifelong romance.

zh: 人不可以逃避苦难，亦不可以放弃希望。
en: We cannot escape hardship, nor can we give up hope.

zh: 唯有“美”能让生命拥意义。
en: Only beauty can give life meaning.

zh: 我们体内住着一个存在，他无所不知，他知道自己想要什么，它比我们更懂得如何生活得更好。
en: There is something within us that knows what it wants and understands how we might live more fully.

zh: 如果一个人一直足够坚定，就能实现他的愿望。
en: If a person remains steadfast enough, they can bring their wish to life.

zh: 我始终沉浸在自己之中，我的注意力永远朝向内心。
en: I remain immersed in myself, with my attention always turned inward.

zh: 寻找自己，在自己内心扎根，试探着走出自己的道路，无论这条路将通向何方。
en: Find yourself, take root within, and gently make your own path wherever it may lead.

zh: 读书，痛苦，爱着从痛苦中滋生出来的那份喜悦，这是一个永无止境的过程。
en: To read, to endure, and to love the joy that grows from hardship is an endless process.

zh: 我遇见的每一个人，街头的每一丝气味，都让我有了无限去爱的理由。
en: Every person I meet and every scent in the street gives me endless reasons to love.
